author: LiaochengD
text:
Spring breezes sweep over fertile fields, Farmers busily tend to their toil!

On the eve of Qingming Festival, the critical period for spring plowing and field management has arrived. In our city, a bustling scene unfolds across farmlands: local farmers are seizing the precious farming season, carrying out spring plowing and field management in an orderly manner, laying a solid foundation for a bountiful harvest throughout the year.

#Liaocheng #SpringPlowing #Qingming
